mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MCP_CANCEL_REQUEST WHERE (PROC_CD IS NULL OR PROC_CD != 'CP') AND SYS_RDATE_DD <= TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -6)), 'YYYYMMDD')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MCP_CANCEL_REQUEST WHERE (PROC_CD IS NULL OR PROC_CD != 'CP') AND SYS_RDATE_DD <= TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -6)), 'YYYYMMDD')
